name: HackAgent
description: AI-powered hackathon platform. Organizers create events, AI models review submissions, results are published as shareable reports.

skills.name: Register for Hackathon
skills.description: Register a team or individual for a hackathon event. Supports DID-verified identity for Sybil resistance.
examples: Register my team for the ETHGlobal Cannes 2026 hackathon
Sign up for the Monad Hackathon with DID verification

skills.name: Submit Project
skills.description: Submit a hackathon project with GitHub URL, demo link, and description for AI review.
examples: Submit my project at github.com/me/my-project to the active hackathon

skills.name: Get Review Results
skills.description: Retrieve AI review scores, rankings, and judge comments for a submitted project or event.
examples: What score did my project get?
Show the leaderboard for the ETHGlobal Cannes hackathon
